question: The attached spreadsheet contains the sales of menu items for a regional fast-food chain. Which city had the greater total sales: Wharvton or Algrimand?

working_plan: Extract the relevant data from the artifact.
Use sandboxed code for any calculations or parsing.

solver.reasoning_summary: I parsed the sales data from the attached spreadsheet and calculated total sales for both cities by summing all menu item sales. Wharvton had total sales of 12,055 (1983+2008+2014+2015+2017+2018) while Algrimand had total sales of 11,907 (1958+1971+1982+1989+1998+2009). Therefore Wharvton had the greater total sales.

tool_calls.name: sandbox_exec

arguments.code:
import csv
from io import StringIO

# The data from the attachment
data = """Location,Burgers,Hot Dogs,Salads,Fries,Ice Cream,Soda
Pinebrook,1594,1999,2002,2005,1977,1980
Wharvton,1983,2008,2014,2015,2017,2018
Sagrada,2019,2022,2022,2023,2021,2019
Algrimand,1958,1971,1982,1989,1998,2009
Marztep,2015,2016,2018,2019,2021,2022
San Cecelia,2011,2010,2012,2013,2015,2016
Pimento,2017,1999,2001,2003,1969,2967
Tinseles,1967,1969,1982,1994,2005,2006
Rosdale,2007,2009,2021,1989,2005,2011"""

# Parse the CSV data
csv_reader = csv.DictReader(StringIO(data))

wharvton_total = 0
algrimand_total = 0

for row in csv_reader:
    location = row['Location']
    
    if location == 'Wharvton':
        # Sum all menu item sales for Wharvton
        wharvton_total = (int(row['Burgers']) + int(row['Hot Dogs']) + 
                         int(row['Salads']) + int(row['Fries']) + 
                         int(row['Ice Cream']) + int(row['Soda']))
        print(f"Wharvton sales: {row['Burgers']} + {row['Hot Dogs']} + {row['Salads']} + {row['Fries']} + {row['Ice Cream']} + {row['Soda']} = {wharvton_total}")
        
    elif location == 'Algrimand':
        # Sum all menu item sales for Algrimand
        algrimand_total = (int(row['Burgers']) + int(row['Hot Dogs']) + 
                          int(row['Salads']) + int(row['Fries']) + 
                          int(row['Ice Cream']) + int(row['Soda']))
        print(f"Algrimand sales: {row['Burgers']} + {row['Hot Dogs']} + {row['Salads']} + {row['Fries']} + {row['Ice Cream']} + {row['Soda']} = {algrimand_total}")

print(f"\nTotal sales comparison:")
print(f"Wharvton: {wharvton_total}")
print(f"Algrimand: {algrimand_total}")

if wharvton_total > algrimand_total:
    print(f"\nWharvton has greater total sales ({wharvton_total} > {algrimand_total})")
    winner = "Wharvton"
else:
    print(f"\nAlgrimand has greater total sales ({algrimand_total} > {wharvton_total})")
    winner = "Algrimand"

print(f"Winner: {winner}")
